title: Salty Fluffy Mexican Bok Choy Stir-fry
description: This kid-friendly Mexican-inspired dish features salty and fluffy bok choy that's perfect for stir-frying at home. It's a gluten-free recipe suitable for all kids to prepare with parental supervision.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp olive oil or avocado oil

instructions: Heat the oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add the bok choy to the pan, tossing gently with tongs for even cooking. Season with salt as needed.
If desired, sprinkle some cumin powder over the bok choy before serving to enhance its flavor.
